subject: Can I import from Apple Notes?

messages.subject: Can I import from Apple Notes?
messages.summary: Asks whether Drafto can import from Apple Notes.
messages.content: <email>Hi — quick question. I have ~600 notes in Apple Notes. Is there a way to bring them into Drafto, or do I need to copy-paste each one? Thanks!</email>
